# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.
# Category: xxe

<?php

/**
 * Enterprise Configuration Management System
 * XML Configuration File Parser using SimpleXML
 */

class XmlConfigProcessor
{
    private ?SimpleXMLElement $xml = null;
    private array $settings = [];
    private array $errors = [];
    private int $maxFileSizeBytes = 5242880; // 5MB
    private array $allowedRootElements = ['configuration', 'config', 'settings', 'appSettings'];

    /**
     * Load and parse XML configuration from a string
     *
     * @param string $xmlString Raw XML content
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded
     */
    public function loadFromString(string $xmlString): bool
    {
        $this->errors = [];
        $this->settings = [];

        if (empty(trim($xmlString))) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content is empty.';
            return false;
        }

        if (strlen($xmlString) > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML content exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . ($this->maxFileSizeBytes / 1024 / 1024) . 'MB.';
            return false;
        }

        // Sanitize: Disable external entity loading to prevent XXE attacks
        $previousLibxmlSetting = libxml_disable_entity_loader(true);
        libxml_use_internal_errors(true);
        libxml_clear_errors();

        // Detect and reject DOCTYPE declarations (XXE prevention)
        if (preg_match('/<!DOCTYPE/i', $xmlString)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML contains DOCTYPE declaration which is not allowed for security reasons.';
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlSetting);
            return false;
        }

        // Detect and reject processing instructions that could be malicious
        if (preg_match('/<\?(?!xml\s)/i', $xmlString)) {
            $this->errors[] = 'XML contains unsupported processing instructions.';
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlSetting);
            return false;
        }

        $this->xml = simplexml_load_string(
            $xmlString,
            'SimpleXMLElement',
            LIBXML_NOCDATA | LIBXML_NONET | LIBXML_NOENT
        );

        if ($this->xml === false) {
            $xmlErrors = libxml_get_errors();
            foreach ($xmlErrors as $error) {
                $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                    'XML Parse Error [Line %d, Col %d]: %s',
                    $error->line,
                    $error->column,
                    trim($error->message)
                );
            }
            libxml_clear_errors();
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlSetting);
            return false;
        }

        // Validate root element
        $rootName = $this->xml->getName();
        if (!in_array(strtolower($rootName), array_map('strtolower', $this->allowedRootElements))) {
            $this->errors[] = sprintf(
                'Invalid root element "%s". Allowed root elements: %s',
                $rootName,
                implode(', ', $this->allowedRootElements)
            );
            libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlSetting);
            return false;
        }

        libxml_clear_errors();
        libxml_disable_entity_loader($previousLibxmlSetting);

        // Extract settings into a flat/nested array
        $this->settings = $this->extractSettings($this->xml);

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Load and parse XML configuration from an uploaded file
     *
     * @param array $uploadedFile The $_FILES entry for the uploaded file
     * @return bool True if parsing succeeded
     */
    public function loadFromUploadedFile(array $uploadedFile): bool
    {
        $this->errors = [];

        // Validate uploaded file structure
        if (!isset($uploadedFile['tmp_name'], $uploadedFile['error'], $uploadedFile['size'], $uploadedFile['name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Invalid file upload data.';
            return false;
        }

        // Check for upload errors
        if ($uploadedFile['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            $this->errors[] = $this->getUploadErrorMessage($uploadedFile['error']);
            return false;
        }

        // Validate file extension
        $extension = strtolower(pathinfo($uploadedFile['name'], PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        if ($extension !== 'xml') {
            $this->errors[] = 'Only .xml files are allowed.';
            return false;
        }

        // Validate file size
        if ($uploadedFile['size'] > $this->maxFileSizeBytes) {
            $this->errors[] = 'File exceeds maximum allowed size of ' . ($this->maxFileSizeBytes / 1024 / 1024) . 'MB.';
            return false;
        }

        // Validate it was actually uploaded (security check)
        if (!is_uploaded_file($uploadedFile['tmp_name'])) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Security error: File was not uploaded through HTTP POST.';
            return false;
        }

        // Validate MIME type
        $finfo = new finfo(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $mimeType = $finfo->file($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        $allowedMimeTypes = ['text/xml', 'application/xml', 'text/plain'];
        if (!in_array($mimeType, $allowedMimeTypes)) {
            $this->errors[] = sprintf('Invalid file type "%s". Only XML files are accepted.', $mimeType);
            return false;
        }

        $xmlContent = file_get_contents($uploadedFile['tmp_name']);
        if ($xmlContent === false) {
            $this->errors[] = 'Failed to read uploaded file.';
            return false;
        }

        return $this->loadFromString($xmlContent);
    }

    /**
     * Recursively extract settings from SimpleXMLElement into an associative array
     *
     * @param SimpleXMLElement $element
     * @param string $prefix Current namespace/section prefix
     * @return array
     */
    private function extractSettings(SimpleXMLElement $element, string $prefix = ''): array
    {
        $settings = [];

        foreach ($element->children() as $child) {
            $name = $child->getName();
            $fullKey = $prefix ? $prefix . '.' . $name : $name;

            // Check for key/value pair pattern: <setting key="..." value="..." />
            if (isset($child['key']) && isset($child['value'])) {
                $key = $this->sanitizeSettingValue((string)$child['key']);
                $value = $this->sanitizeSettingValue((string)$child['value']);
                $type = isset($child['type']) ? (string)$child['type'] : 'string';
                $settings[$key] = $this->castValue($value, $type);
                continue;
            }

            // Check for name/value pair pattern: <setting name="..." value="..." />
            if (isset($child['name']) && isset($child['value'])) {
                $key = $this->sanitizeSettingValue((string)$child['name']);
                $value = $this->sanitizeSettingValue((string)$child['value']);
                $type = isset($child['type']) ? (string)$child['type'] : 'string';
                $settings[$key] = $this->castValue($value, $type);
                continue;
            }

            // Check if the element has child elements (section/group)
            if ($child->count() > 0) {
                $childSettings = $this->extractSettings($child, $fullKey);
                $settings[$name] = $childSettings;
            } else {
                // Leaf node - extract text content and attributes
                $textContent = trim((string)$child);
                $attributes = [];

                foreach ($child->attributes() as $attrName => $attrValue) {
                    $attributes[$attrName] = $this->sanitizeSettingValue((string)$attrValue);
                }

                if (!empty($attributes) && !empty($textContent)) {
                    $settings[$name] = array_merge(
                        ['_value' => $this->sanitizeSettingValue($textContent)],
                        ['_attributes' => $attributes]
                    );
                } elseif (!empty($attributes)) {
                    $settings[$name] = $attributes;
                } else {
                    $type = isset($child['type']) ? (string)$child['type'] : 'string';
                    $settings[$name] = $this->castValue(
                        $this->sanitizeSettingValue($textContent),
                        $type
                    );
                }
            }
        }

        return $settings;
    }

    /**
     * Cast a string value to the specified type
     *
     * @param string $value
     * @param string $type
     * @return mixed
     */
    private function castValue(string $value, string $type): mixed
    {
        return match (strtolower($type)) {
            'int', 'integer' => (int)$value,
            'float', 'double', 'decimal' => (float)$value,
            'bool', 'boolean' => in_array(strtolower($value), ['true', '1', 'yes', 'on']),
            'array', 'list' => array_map('trim', explode(',', $value)),
            'json' => json_decode($value, true) ?? $value,
            default => $value,
        };
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize a setting value to prevent XSS and injection
     *
     * @param string $value
     * @return string
     */
    private function sanitizeSettingValue(string $value): string
    {
        $value = trim($value);
        $value = htmlspecialchars($value, ENT_QUOTES | ENT_HTML5, 'UTF-8');
        return $value;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific setting by dot-notation key
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key (e.g., "database.host")
     * @param mixed $default Default value if key not found
     * @return mixed
     */
    public function get(string $key, mixed $default = null): mixed
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $key);
        $current = $this->settings;

        foreach ($keys as $segment) {
            if (!is_array($current) || !array_key_exists($segment, $current)) {
                return $default;
            }
            $current = $current[$segment];
        }

        return $current;
    }

    /**
     * Get all extracted settings
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getAll(): array
    {
        return $this->settings;
    }

    /**
     * Get a specific section of settings
     *
     * @param string $section
     * @return array|null
     */
    public function getSection(string $section): ?array
    {
        $result = $this->get($section);
        return is_array($result) ? $result : null;
    }

    /**
     * Check if a specific setting exists
     *
     * @param string $key Dot-notation key
     * @return bool
     */
    public function has(string $key): bool
    {
        $keys = explode('.', $key);
        $current = $this->settings;

        foreach ($keys as $segment) {
            if (!is_array($current) || !array_key_exists($segment, $current)) {
                return false;
            }
            $current = $current[$segment];
        }

        return true;
    }

    /**
     * Get all errors that occurred during parsing
     *
     * @return array
     */
    public function getErrors(): array
    {
        return $this->errors;
    }

    /**
     * Check if parsing was successful (no errors)
     *
     * @return bool
     */
    public function isValid(): bool
    {
        return empty($this->errors);
    }

    /**
     * Set the maximum allowed file size in bytes
     *
     * @param int $bytes
     * @return self
     */
    public function setMaxFileSize(int $bytes): self
    {
        $this->maxFileSizeBytes = $bytes;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Set allowed root element names
     *
     * @param array $elements
     * @return self
     */
    public function setAllowedRootElements(array $elements): self
    {
        $this->allowedRootElements = $elements;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Flatten nested settings into dot-notation keys
     *
     * @param array|null $settings
     * @param string $prefix
     * @return array
     */
    public function flatten(?array $settings = null, string $prefix = ''): array
    {
        $settings = $settings ?? $this->settings;
        $flat = [];

        foreach ($settings as $key => $value) {
            $fullKey = $prefix ? $prefix . '.' . $key : $key;
            if (is_array($value) && !isset($value['_value'])) {
                $flat = array_merge($flat, $this->flatten($value, $fullKey));
            } else {
                $flat[$fullKey] = $value;
            }
        }

        return $flat;
    }

    /**
     * Export settings as JSON string
     *
     * @param bool $prettyPrint
     * @return string
     */
    public function toJson(bool $prettyPrint = true): string
    {
        $flags = JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_UNESCAPED_SLASHES;
        if ($prettyPrint) {
            $flags |= JSON_PRETTY_PRINT;
        }
        return json_encode($this->settings, $flags);
    }

    /**
     * Validate settings against a schema definition
     *
     * @param array $schema Array defining required keys and their expected types
     * @return array List of validation errors (empty if valid)
     */
    public function validateAgainstSchema(array $schema): array
    {
        $validationErrors = [];
        $flatSettings = $this->flatten();

        foreach ($schema as $key => $rules) {
            $required = $rules['required'] ?? false;
            $type = $rules['type'] ?? null;
            $allowedValues = $rules['allowed_values'] ?? null;
            $pattern = $rules['pattern'] ?? null;

            if ($required && !isset($flatSettings[$key])) {
                $validationErrors[] = sprintf('Required setting "%s" is missing.', $key);
                continue;
            }

            if (!isset($flatSettings[$key])) {
                continue;
            }

            $value = $flatSettings[$key];

            if ($type !== null) {
                $actualType = gettype($value);
                if ($actualType !== $type && !($type === 'string' && is_scalar($value))) {
                    $validationErrors[] = sprintf(
                        'Setting "%s" expected type "%s" but got "%s".',
                        $key,
                        $type,
                        $actualType
                    );
                }
            }

            if ($allowedValues !== null && !in_array($value, $allowedValues, true)) {
                $validationErrors[] = sprintf(
                    'Setting "%s" has invalid value "%s". Allowed values: %s',
                    $key,
                    $value,
                    implode(', ', $allowedValues)
                );
            }

            if ($pattern !== null && is_string($value) && !preg_match($pattern, $value)) {
                $validationErrors[] = sprintf(
                    'Setting "%s" value "%s" does not match required pattern.',
                    $key,
                    $value
                );
            }
        }

        return $validationErrors;
    }

    /**
     * Get human-readable upload error message
     *
     * @param int $errorCode
     * @return string
     */
    private function getUploadErrorMessage(int $errorCode): string
    {
        return match ($errorCode) {
            UPLOAD_ERR_INI_SIZE => 'File exceeds the upload_max_filesize directive in php.ini.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_FORM_SIZE => 'File exceeds the MAX_FILE_SIZE directive in the HTML form.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_PARTIAL => 'File was only partially uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE => 'No file was uploaded.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_NO_TMP_DIR => 'Missing temporary folder on server.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_CANT_WRITE => 'Failed to write file to disk on server.',
            UPLOAD_ERR_EXTENSION => 'A PHP extension stopped the file upload.',
            default => 'Unknown upload error.',
        };
    }
}


// ============================================================================
// USAGE EXAMPLES
// ============================================================================

/*
 * Example 1: Parse XML from a string
 */

$xmlConfig = <<<XML
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<configuration>
    <appInfo>
        <name>Enterprise App</name>
        <version>3.2.1</version>
        <environment>production</environment>
    </appInfo>
    
    <database>
        <host>db.enterprise.local</host>
        <port type="integer">5432</port>
        <name>enterprise_db</name>
        <username>app_user</username>
        <password>s3cur3P@ss!</password>
        <poolSize type="integer">25</poolSize>
        <ssl type="boolean">true</ssl>
        <options>
            <timeout type="integer">30</timeout>
            <retries type="integer">3</retries>
            <charset>utf8mb4</charset>
        </options>
    </database>
    
    <cache>
        <driver>redis</driver>
        <host>cache.enterprise.local</host>
        <port type="integer">6379</port>
        <ttl type="integer">3600</ttl>
        <prefix>ent_</prefix>
    </cache>
    
    <logging>
        <level>warning</level>
        <channels type="list">file,syslog,slack</channels>
        <maxFileSize type="integer">104857600</maxFileSize>
        <retentionDays type="integer">90</retentionDays>
    </logging>
    
    <security>
        <setting key="session.lifetime" value="120" type="integer" />
        <setting key="csrf.enabled" value="true" type="boolean" />
        <setting key="cors.origins" value="https://app.enterprise.com,https://admin.enterprise.com" type="list" />
        <setting key="encryption.algorithm" value="AES-256-GCM" />
    </security>
    
    <features>
        <setting name="two_factor_auth" value="true" type="boolean" />
        <setting name="api_rate_limit" value="1000" type="integer" />
        <setting name="maintenance_mode" value="false" type="boolean" />
    </features>
</configuration>
XML;

$processor = new XmlConfigProcessor();

if ($processor->loadFromString($xmlConfig)) {
    echo "=== Configuration Loaded Successfully ===\n\n";

    // Get all settings
    echo "All Settings:\n";
    print_r($processor->getAll());

    // Access specific settings using dot notation
    echo "\nApp Name: " . $processor->get('appInfo.name') . "\n";
    echo "DB Host: " . $processor->get('database.host') . "\n";
    echo "DB Port: " . $processor->get('database.port') . "\n";
    echo "DB SSL: " . ($processor->get('database.ssl') ? 'true' : 'false') . "\n";
    echo "DB Timeout: " . $processor->get('database.options.timeout') . "\n";
    echo "Cache Driver: " . $processor->get('cache.driver') . "\n";
    echo "Log Level: " . $processor->get('logging.level') . "\n";

    // Get a section
    echo "\nDatabase Section:\n";
    print_r($processor->getSection('database'));

    // Check if settings exist
    echo "\nHas 'cache.host': " . ($processor->has('cache.host') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";
    echo "Has 'nonexistent.key': " . ($processor->has('nonexistent.key') ? 'Yes' : 'No') . "\n";

    // Get with default value
    echo "Missing key with default: " . $processor->get('missing.key', 'default_value') . "\n";

    // Flatten all settings
    echo "\nFlattened Settings:\n";
    print_r($processor->flatten());

    // Export as JSON
    echo "\nJSON Export:\n";
    echo $processor->toJson() . "\n";

    // Validate against a schema
    $schema = [
        'database.host' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'string'],
        'database.port' => ['required' => true, 'type' => 'integer'],
        'cache.driver' => [
            'required' => true,
            'type' => 'string',
            'allowed_values' => ['redis', 'memcached', 'file']
        ],
        'logging.level' => [
            'required' => true,
            'type' => 'string',
            'allowed_values' => ['debug', 'info', 'warning', 'error', 'critical']
        ],
    ];

    $validationErrors = $processor->validateAgainstSchema($schema);
    if (empty($validationErrors)) {
        echo "\nSchema validation passed!\n";
    } else {
        echo "\nSchema validation errors:\n";
        foreach ($validationErrors as $error) {
            echo "  - $error\n";
        }
    }
} else {
    echo "Failed to parse configuration:\n";
    foreach ($processor->getErrors() as $error) {
        echo "  - $error\n";
    }
}

/*
 * Example 2: Load from an uploaded file (in a web context)
 */

/*
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST' && isset($_FILES['config_file'])) {
    $processor = new XmlConfigProcessor();
    $processor->setMaxFileSize(2 * 1024 * 1024); // 2MB max

    if ($processor->loadFromUploadedFile($_FILES['config_file'])) {
        // Configuration loaded successfully
        $allSettings = $processor->getAll();
        
        // Process/store settings as needed
        // e.g., save to database, update runtime config, etc.
        
        echo json_encode([
            'status' => 'success',
            'message' => 'Configuration uploaded and parsed successfully.',
            'settings_count' => count($processor->flatten()),
        ]);
    } else {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'status' => 'error',
            'errors' => $processor->getErrors(),
        ]);
    }
}
*/
